behavior: Fetches career job bundle by slug and redirects to /career/jobs/{job.slug} when indexable.
Redirects resolved occupation to canonical career job URL.
Redirects resolved family to canonical family URL.
Renders ambiguous candidates instead of selecting silently.
Matches OccupationAlias, Occupation, OccupationFamily, and RecommendationSnapshot data.
Filters occupation candidates through publish readiness and index eligibility.
Accepts only https canonical hosts fermatmind.com and www.fermatmind.com.
Filters through career SEO authority before exposing job paths.

auditFindings.reason: Static code shows canonical redirection and backend filtering, but live payload canonical samples were not fetched in this artifact generation.
Alias helper is noindex and redirect-based; Phase 5B should sample aliases to ensure aliases do not remain indexable final URLs.
Catch-all route returns notFound when no job/guide/family match exists.
CareerJobDetailResource can suppress display_surface_v1 and set noindex when locale is not ready; Phase 5B should sample zh-CN/en-US payloads.
Sitemap path extraction and SEO authority filtering exist; live sitemap/canonical pair sampling is still required.

requiredFixesBeforePhase5B: Run live or fixture sample of representative alias queries and verify final canonical paths.
Compare backend sitemap source loc values against frontend canonical metadata for sampled career job details.
Verify locale-specific canonical URLs do not point to noindex or locale-not-ready surfaces.
